description_long: This is a commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back low-mounted wings, and two large turbofan engines mounted under each wing. The fuselage is predominantly white with blue accents, including a blue tail fin adorned with white stars and the 'HiFly' logo on the side. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, featuring a row of cockpit windows, and the passenger windows run along the length of the body. The tail section has a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The landing gear is not visible in these views, but the overall design suggests a modern jet airliner suitable for medium-haul flights.
description: A modern commercial passenger airplane with low-mounted swept wings, twin underwing turbofan engines, and a blue-and-white livery featuring the 'HiFly' logo and star-decorated tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, and the symmetry of the swept-back wings and underwing engines.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'HiFly' logo, blue engine nacelle, and the star-patterned vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, horizontal stabilizers, and the alignment of the engines beneath the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the opposite engine and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple cockpit windows.
